expectations.text: Uses google-genai Python package (not deprecated google-generativeai)
expectations.evidence: pip install google-genai, imports from google import genai, uses genai.Client(api_key=...)

expectations.text: Strips base64 data URI prefix before sending to API
expectations.evidence: re.sub(r'^data:image/\w+;base64,', '', image_base64) — exact same regex as TypeScript version

expectations.text: Uses async def endpoints with proper FastAPI patterns
expectations.evidence: async def translate_image, Pydantic models for request/response, response_model parameter, lifespan context manager

expectations.text: Includes error handling with appropriate HTTP error responses
expectations.evidence: ValueError -> 400, generic Exception -> 500, input validation with 400, startup key check
